---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest tooling, infrastructure, or non-architectural improvements
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who needs it?

## Proposed Solution

What you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Scope

- [ ] Affects PyTorch prototype
- [ ] Affects Rust crates
- [ ] Affects Lean4 formalization
- [ ] Affects CI / tooling
- [ ] Affects docs

## Additional Context

Links, references, mockups.

---

> **Note:** For *architectural* changes (new model mechanisms, recurrence
> changes, Clifford variants), use the **Research Proposal** template instead.
